name: warframe-knowledge-core
description: 可审核、可复用的 Warframe 中文事实与社区知识核心

scripts.sync:weapons: node scripts/compile-official-drop-tables.js && node scripts/compile-official-quest-rewards.js && node scripts/compile-official-vendor-offers.js && node scripts/compile-simaris-weapon-sources.js && node scripts/sync-official-weapons.js && node scripts/compile-official-support-quest-weapons.js && node scripts/compile-weapon-wiki-acquisition.js && node scripts/compile-package-weapon-acquisition.js && node scripts/sync-weapon-knowledge.js && node scripts/audit-weapon-coverage.js
scripts.check:weapons: node scripts/compile-official-drop-tables.js --check && node scripts/compile-official-quest-rewards.js --check && node scripts/compile-official-vendor-offers.js --check && node scripts/compile-simaris-weapon-sources.js --check && node scripts/sync-official-weapons.js --check && node scripts/compile-official-support-quest-weapons.js --check && node scripts/compile-weapon-wiki-acquisition.js --check && node scripts/compile-package-weapon-acquisition.js --check && node scripts/sync-weapon-knowledge.js --check && node scripts/audit-weapon-coverage.js --check
scripts.maintain: npm run sync:mods && npm run sync:mod-wiki && npm run sync:official && npm run sync:items && npm run sync:weapons && npm run sync:arcane-supplements && npm run sync:arcane-sources && npm run sync:arcanes && npm run sync:arcane-wiki && npm run sync:localization && npm run sync:entities && npm run sync:locations && npm run sync:mission-types && npm run sync:frame-source-locations && npm run sync:frame-currencies && npm run sync:quests && npm run sync:factions && npm run sync:npcs && npm run sync:frames && npm run sync:frame-knowledge && npm run sync:frame-categories && npm run sync:resources && npm run sync:consumables && npm run sync:coverage && npm run sync:bundled-core && npm run validate && npm test && npm run build
scripts.check:all: npm run check:mods && npm run check:mod-wiki && npm run check:official && npm run check:items && npm run check:weapons && npm run check:arcane-supplements && npm run check:arcane-sources && npm run check:arcanes && npm run check:arcane-wiki && npm run check:localization && npm run check:entities && npm run check:locations && npm run check:mission-types && npm run check:frame-source-locations && npm run check:frame-currencies && npm run check:quests && npm run check:factions && npm run check:npcs && npm run check:frames && npm run check:frame-knowledge && npm run check:frame-categories && npm run check:resources && npm run check:consumables && npm run check:coverage && npm run check:bundled-core && npm run validate && npm test
